description_long: This is a full-size, rectangular computer keyboard with a sleek, low-profile design and a matte black finish. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY key layout, including a numeric keypad on the right side, function keys along the top row, and a set of arrow keys. The keycaps are uniformly shaped and slightly concave, with white printed legends for easy visibility. The chassis appears to be made of durable plastic, with a flat base and minimal bezels around the edges. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the surface. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A full-size, matte black keyboard with a numeric keypad and white legends, featuring a modern, low-profile design and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the alphanumeric section, function keys, and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and flat base, with keys visible in a single row.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the key layout and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the low-profile design and the uniform height of the keys.
